preguntas.pregunta:
PARTE 1/10 — READ THE TEXT AND ANSWER THE QUESTION:

When a machine or a tool is made, the most suitable material must be chosen by considering its properties, which can be classified as mechanical, thermal, electrical and chemical.

Question: According to the text, how can the properties of a material be classified?
opciones: As metal, polymer, ceramic and composite.
As mechanical, thermal, electrical and chemical.
As soft, pasty, resistant and brittle.

preguntas.pregunta:
PARTE 2/10 — READ THE TEXT AND ANSWER THE QUESTION:

The main types of materials used in mechanical engineering are metals, polymer materials, ceramics and composite materials.

Question: Which of the following is NOT listed as one of the main types of materials in mechanical engineering?

PARTE 3/10 — READ THE TEXT AND ANSWER THE QUESTION:

The most commonly used materials are metals, which can be divided into ferrous and non-ferrous. They can be used in their pure form or mixed with other elements.

Question: What are the two forms in which metals can be used?
opciones: In their pure form or mixed with other elements.

preguntas.pregunta:
PARTE 4/10 — READ THE TEXT AND ANSWER THE QUESTION:

In this second case we have an alloy and it is used to improve some properties of the metals. The most commonly used ferrous metals are iron and alloys which use iron.

Question: Why do engineers use an alloy?
opciones: To improve some properties of the metals.
To make metals softer and pasty.
To remove iron from the mixture.

preguntas.pregunta:
PARTE 5/10 — READ THE TEXT AND ANSWER THE QUESTION:

Because iron is soft and pasty it is not suitable to be used as a structural material, so a small amount of carbon is added to it to make steel alloy.

Question: What element is added to iron to create steel?

PARTE 6/10 — READ THE TEXT AND ANSWER THE QUESTION:

Non-ferrous metals contain little or no iron. The most common non-ferrous metals used in mechanics are copper, zinc, tin and aluminium.

Question: What is the main characteristic of non-ferrous metals?
opciones: They contain little or no iron.
They are composed mostly of carbon.
They are exclusively used in buildings.

preguntas.pregunta:
PARTE 7/10 — READ THE TEXT AND ANSWER THE QUESTION:

Some common non-ferrous alloys are brass (formed by mixing copper and zinc), bronze (formed by mixing copper and tin) and other aluminium alloys which are used in the aircraft industry.

Question: Which industry extensively uses aluminium alloys according to the text?

PARTE 8/10 — READ THE TEXT AND ANSWER THE QUESTION:

Other examples of materials used in mechanical engineering are plastic and rubber. PVC or polyvinyl chloride is a type of plastic and is used to insulate wires and cables.

Question: What is PVC used for in engineering?
opciones: To mix with copper and create brass.

preguntas.pregunta:
PARTE 9/10 — READ THE TEXT AND ANSWER THE QUESTION:

Rubber is a polymer and its best property is elasticity, as it returns to its original size and shape after deformation. Ceramic materials are good insulators: hard, resistant and strong, but brittle.

Question: What happens to rubber after it suffers a deformation?
opciones: It breaks immediately because it is brittle.
It returns to its original size and shape.
It permanently changes its electrical properties.

preguntas.pregunta:
PARTE 10/10 — READ THE TEXT AND ANSWER THE QUESTION:

Composite materials are made up of two or more materials combined to improve their mechanical properties. Concrete is reinforced with steel and is used in building engineering.

Question: In building engineering, what is concrete reinforced with?
